hard_stops.logic: property must be initialized before any maintenance or work order activities begin
unresolved habitability issues exist — implied warranty of habitability violation with legal liability and potential rent withholding
lead paint remediation being performed by uncertified contractor — EPA RRP Rule violation with penalties up to $37,500 per day

soft_flags.logic: emergency maintenance requests are overdue — tenant safety and liability risk
preventive maintenance completion rate is below 80% — asset deterioration and warranty voiding risk
pending repair cost exceeds tenant's vendor dispatch threshold — owner approval required before dispatch
same unit or system has more than 3 work orders for the same issue — root cause analysis recommended
